title: YH-pig
author: Nathaniel A. Sims
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This is a recording made by Nathaniel Sims of 杨芝全  Yang Zhiquan,  a native speaker of Yonghe Qiang, saying the word for 'pig' in isolation and also within a carrier phrase.
steps_raw: This is a recording made by Nathaniel Sims of 杨芝全  Yang Zhiquan,  a native speaker of Yonghe Qiang, saying the word for 'pig' in isolation and also within a carrier phrase.
